message:
fix(test): remove race condition in test_is_mock_transport_disabled

The test was calling clear_mock_overrides() at start, which breaks the
push/pop semantics of the active_scopes mechanism. This caused race
conditions with parallel tests in the coverage job where another test
could overwrite the mock override between our set_mock_enabled_override
and the assertion.

The fix removes the initial clear and just sets the override directly,
since set_mock_enabled_override works regardless of current state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
